wine_bars.name: La Mirande Bar a Vins
wine_bars.wine_program: All-Rhone and Provence list of 180 references; 20+ by the glass spanning Chateauneuf-du-Pape, Gigondas, Cote-Rotie and Condrieu; sommelier-selected weekly feature pours
wine_bars.description: The wine bar and salon of La Mirande hotel behind the Palais des Papes. Sommelier-led list dominated by Rhone Valley estates with regular vertical and thematic evenings; tasting events coordinated with top estates.

wine_bars.name: Oenothek Wine Bar
wine_bars.address: 14 rue de la Petite Fusterie, 84000 Avignon, France
wine_bars.wine_program: Curated natural and artisan Rhone Valley list with 200+ references; 16 by the glass rotating weekly; owner-sommelier Florence Martin trained at Inter Rhone
wine_bars.description: Neighbourhood wine bar in a vaulted 17th-century cellar near Les Halles market. Florence Martin's selection foregrounds small growers and natural wines from across the Rhone Valley corridor.

verified.address_quoted: 14 rue de la Petite Fusterie, 84000 Avignon

wine_bars.name: Le Bouchon et l'Assiette
wine_bars.wine_program: Tain-centric wine list with 80 Northern Rhone references; emphasis on Hermitage, Crozes-Hermitage and Cornas by the glass; weekly grower-direct additions
wine_bars.description: Intimate wine bar and small-plates venue in Tain-l'Hermitage village, ideally positioned near the Chapoutier and Cave de Tain cellars. Northern Rhone specialist list with bottle shop next door.

wine_bars.name: Le Verger des Papes Wine Bar
wine_bars.wine_program: Exclusively Chateauneuf-du-Pape list of 60 producers; 18 by the glass at any time; panoramic terrace overlooking the vines; guided tasting menus available
wine_bars.description: Wine bar with panoramic terrace at the ruins of the Papal castle in Chateauneuf-du-Pape. Exclusively Chateauneuf-du-Pape producers; sommelier Stephane Bonnet presents guided appellation flights at lunch.

wine_bars.name: Soif Wine Bar
wine_bars.wine_program: Northern and Southern Rhone-focused natural wine list; 200 bottles to eat in or take away; 12-16 by the glass at any time; emphasis on small biodynamic producers
wine_bars.description: Natural wine bar on Place des Clercs in Valence with a strong Rhone Valley grower list. Standing-room counter plus pavement terrasse; wine shop doubles as a reference for natural Rhone producers.

wine_bars.name: La Cave Avignon Bar a Vins
wine_bars.address: 36 rue de la Masse, 84000 Avignon, France
wine_bars.wine_program: 250 references focussed on Rhone Valley; 20 by the glass; regular evening tastings with visiting winemakers; cheese and charcuterie pairings from local producers
wine_bars.description: Underground wine bar in Avignon's old town with vaulted medieval cellar setting. Hosts monthly tasting evenings with Rhone Valley domaines and maintains a strong list of Southern Rhone estates.

wine_bars.name: Le Caveau de Vienne
wine_bars.wine_program: Northern Rhone specialist list with 120 references; Cote-Rotie, Condrieu and Crozes-Hermitage verticals; 10 by the glass from grower selection
wine_bars.description: Wine bar and bistro in Vienne, gateway city to the Northern Rhone appellations. Adjacent to the Roman amphitheatre at Jazz a Vienne festival time; strong Cote-Rotie and Condrieu focus.

wine_bars.name: La Sommeliere
wine_bars.wine_program: Dentelles de Montmirail and wider Southern Rhone list of 160 references; 14 by the glass; emphasis on Gigondas, Vacqueyras and Beaumes-de-Venise from local domaines
wine_bars.description: Wine bar on the main square of Vaison-la-Romaine with an outstanding local producer selection. Flanked by the Roman ruins, La Sommeliere is a gateway to the Dentelles de Montmirail wine villages.

wine_bars.name: La Part des Anges Lyon
wine_bars.wine_program: Rhone Valley and Beaujolais natural grower list; 300 bottles; 20 by the glass rotating daily; natural wine focus with biodynamic Rhone estates prominently featured
wine_bars.description: Lyon's pre-eminent natural wine bar on Rue Lanterne, long established in the Presqu'ile neighbourhood. Strong Rhone Valley grower selection with emphasis on biodynamic and natural producers; wine by the glass programme changes daily.

wine_bars.name: Une Histoire de Vin
wine_bars.wine_program: Chateauneuf-du-Pape, Gigondas and Cotes du Rhone Villages list of 140 references; 12 by the glass; owner is former cave cooperative sommelier
signature_pours: Cotes du Rhone Villages Massif d'Uchaux
wine_bars.description: Intimate wine bar in Orange town centre, midway between Avignon and the Dentelles de Montmirail. Former cooperative sommelier has assembled a producer-direct Southern Rhone list with an excellent value offering.

wine_bars.name: Les Deux Pieces Cuisine Wine Bar
wine_bars.address: 2 rue Rempart du Rhone, 84000 Avignon, France
wine_bars.wine_program: Natural and artisan Rhone wine list; 15 by the glass daily with short snack pairings; sourced from smaller domaines not seen in retail
wine_bars.description: Small natural wine bar inside the Avignon ramparts, steps from the Rhone river. Twice-weekly deliveries from Rhone Valley growers ensure the glass list is always fresh; paired small plates from the kitchen.

wine_bars.name: Le Zinc Wine Bar
wine_bars.address: 8 place Charles de Gaulle, 38200 Vienne, France
wine_bars.wine_program: Cote-Rotie, Condrieu and Saint-Joseph focus; 100 references; 10 by the glass with charcuterie board pairings; regular winemaker evening events
wine_bars.description: Wine bar on Vienne's main square, an ideal first stop for visitors to the Cote-Rotie vineyard. Hosts monthly dinners with Ampuis and Tupin-et-Semons producers; natural wine section expanding annually.

wine_bars.name: L'Annexe Wine Bar
wine_bars.wine_program: Village wine bar with 35 Chateauneuf-du-Pape producers represented by the glass; informal tasting-room atmosphere; local cheese and olive bar
wine_bars.description: Low-key village wine bar on the edge of Chateauneuf-du-Pape within walking distance of several major domaines. A favourite among winemakers' families after harvest; rotating slate of local estate pours.

wine_bars.name: Le Bistrot du Sommelier Avignon
wine_bars.wine_program: 500-label cellar; 25 by the glass spanning the full Rhone Valley; formal sommelier service; weekly pairing dinner with three-course menu
wine_bars.description: Sommelier-led wine bar with one of Avignon's deepest Rhone Valley cellars. Weekly pairing dinners pair seasonal menu to a curated three-wine flight; bottle service available from the full 500-label list.

wine_bars.name: L'Epicerie du Vin Montelimar
wine_bars.wine_program: Cotes du Rhone, Grignan-les-Adhemar and Dieulefit organic producers list; 80 references; 8 by the glass; paired with regional nougat and cheese
wine_bars.description: Wine bar and epicerie in Montelimar combining local Rhone Valley wines with regional produce. A gateway to Grignan-les-Adhemar wines from the Drome corridor, often overlooked in favour of more famous southern appellations.
